commands.repair_reason: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can remove the raw error detail and tighten the unreadable-schema tests without choosing a new product direction.; Needs attention: The diff has no supply-chain changes, but the validation wrapper still exposes raw schema exception text on a model-facing error path.; Review finding: [P2] Drop raw schema error detail from tool results — packages/llm-core/src/validation.ts:285-287 (sha=ff8cc75cbf5cfc6645a5bca391935f9572a98974)
commands.review_summary:
The PR wraps llm-core tool-argument schema read/compile/check/error failures in a validation error and adds unreadable-schema regression tests.

PR surface: Source +23, Tests +62. Total +85 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main is source-reproducible: validateToolArguments reads tool.parameters and TypeBox walks nested schema properties before any guard, so accessor failures can escape as raw errors.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can remove the raw error detail and tighten the unreadable-schema tests without choosing a new product direction.

target.title: fix(llm-core): guard tool argument schema validation
target.body:
## Summary

- snapshot tool schemas once during argument validation
- convert unreadable or un-compilable schema failures into deterministic tool validation errors
- add regressions for top-level and nested unreadable schema accessors

## Verification

- `OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 OPENCLAW_VITEST_FS_MODULE_CACHE_PATH=/tmp/openclaw-vitest-next191-red nodenv exec node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run packages/llm-core/src/validation.test.ts --testNamePattern="unreadable" --reporter=verbose` failed before the fix by leaking raw getter errors
- `OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 OPENCLAW_VITEST_FS_MODULE_CACHE_PATH=/tmp/openclaw-vitest-next191-rebase1 nodenv exec node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run packages/llm-core/src/validation.test.ts --reporter=verbose`
- `nodenv exec node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs packages/llm-core/src/validation.ts packages/llm-core/src/validation.test.ts`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: unreadable plugin/extension tool schemas can no longer leak raw schema getter/compile errors from the LLM-core tool argument validation entry point.

Real environment tested: local focused llm-core validation Vitest shard in the linked gwt worktree, plus oxlint, diff-check, and branch autoreview.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: reproduced the pre-fix raw getter leak with unreadable-schema regressions, rebased on current `origin/main`, then ran the affected llm-core validation tests, oxlint, `git diff --check`, and branch autoreview.

Evidence after fix: `packages/llm-core/src/validation.test.ts` passed 4/4 after the rebase; branch autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings and `overall: patch is correct (0.82)`.

Observed result after fix: top-level and nested unreadable schema accessors are reported as normal validation failures for the requested tool instead of escaping as raw extension-controlled exceptions.

What was not tested: broad `pnpm check:changed` was not run because Blacksmith Testbox is not authenticated in this environment and AWS Crabbox coordinator calls returned 401 on run history and lease creation.
target.author: vincentkoc
